transcript: I think I might have just found an infinite money glitch on PolyMarket with the five minute up down Bitcoin market. Earlier today, I made $400 in less than 20 minutes using this strategy, and so far it's hit at 100%. This is an extremely simple strategy. Just go to the Bitcoin up down five minute chart. And if at any point in the first two minutes of the five minutes, the buy down or buy up goes below $0.25, you're going to buy it. And then immediately after, you're going to set a limit order to sell that position at $0.40. So you're basically getting a 2x on your return. And because these prices fluctuate so much, you're very likely to win almost every single time.
